summary: Built a hybrid Apache Spark engine that unifies Kafka streaming and batch under one long-lived context — a 6-month R&D cycle in Java/Scala, mentored by a Samsung Senior Chief Engineer.
Founded and led a 14-person team and won VIT's first AICTE software grant. Designed the roadmap for a 30+ POS-integration platform; shipped the marketing site (full platform scoped, not built).
